name: Six Week Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first six ingredients together until well combined.
2. Add the eggs, buttermilk, and oil to the dry mixture. Stir thoroughly until no lumps remain.
3. Cover the batter and refrigerate overnight before using.
- To prepare for baking, spray muffin pans with non-stick spray.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
5. The batter can be stored in the refrigerator for up to six weeks.
6. Once baked, the muffins can be frozen for later use.
